UK Crime Files: Tracking a Serial Killer

programmes.show_description: Pennie Davis from Hampshire was killed in 2014, after a revived feud led Ben Carr to hire a hitman. S3, Ep1
Carole Waugh returned to London and fell for a fraudster who was determined to get her money. S1, Ep4
Zack Bowen charms bartender Addie Hall during Hurricane Katrina in New Orleans. But a destructive relationship soon ensues, and Zack kills Addie and then himself. S1, Ep1
Alleged slander, toxic trash and a major disagreement over property lines come into play when neighbours go after each other. S23, Ep16
A gambler wins a seven-day cruise, but makes the very wrong choice in travelling companions and claims she was left stranded in Miami. S23, Ep17
A woman claims she was falsely arrested for domestic violence and explains how her boyfriend got his scratches. S23, Ep18
When alcohol and alleged idiocy come into play, the Judge reminds litigants that lunch is right around the corner if they can't prove their case. S23, Ep19
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
After receiving a large settlement cheque, a woman purchases breast augmentation surgery and is cared for by a friend. They then fight over a loan. S23, Ep21
A woman admits that she promised to pay for her incarcerated son's property damage; when she changes her mind, her Harley is towed by his ex-roommate. S23, Ep22
A couple shell out $4,000 to a man for a mobile home only to discover that he doesn't even own the trailer and has allegedly sold it more than once. S23, Ep23
When the Judge realises that a fight over a used Mercedes Benz lacks critical evidence, she reminds lax litigants that she has better things to do. S23, Ep24
A young woman plans a cruise with her mother only to have the trip cancelled; she is accused of pocketing the refund and going on a cruise with her aunt. S23, Ep25
A woman accuses her ex-lover of destroying over $2,000 worth of clothing in an alleged fit of jealousy. S24, Ep96
When an executive closes her company, she illegally leases her space to another businesswoman who also closes her company. S24, Ep97
After a neighbourhood catfight breaks out, the Judge must decide how injuries were inflicted when both women deny placing their hands on each other. S20, Ep23
When an unleashed Pit Bull confronts a woman and her dog, she claims her pet defended her and took the brunt of the vicious attack. S20, Ep24
The Judge warns litigants not to enter her courtroom unless they have clean hands; both parties learn her lesson the hard way in their ensuing eviction battle. S20, Ep25
When a woman's hair starts to fall out immediately after a treatment, she blames her hairdresser; he blames her self-colouring attempts to cover grey hair. S20, Ep26
Unhappy with a crowded parking lot, a salon owner tells police that the church next door deals drugs causing them to lose summer funding. S20, Ep27
Ex friends fight over custody of Gonzo the dog after a new baby arrives on the scene and a restraining order comes into play. S20, Ep28
A woman desperate not to lose custody of her daughter accepts help from her mother who recently received a large disability settlement. S20, Ep29
A man spends two nights in jail after his ex-lover accuses him of assaulting her; he claims she struck him first and was high on prescription drugs. S20, Ep30
A pregnant woman loses financing of her $10,000 car shortly after being fired; she sues the car dealer for money she paid on the car. S20, Ep31
A genealogy search results in a reunion between family members who go into business together only to fight over $5,000 and alleged fraud. S20, Ep32
When brothers fight to reclaim their mobile home they say a knife was pulled on them; the man who bought the camper said its maiden voyage failed. S24, Ep98
A man's untimely death leaves family members fighting over his alleged stock certificates. S24, Ep99
When a woman offers up an outrageous party rental story after being accused of extortion, the Judge says her defence is 'the dumbest thing I've ever heard!'. S24, Ep100
Screams from a little girl alert neighbours and family members that a friendly dog walk has gone terribly wrong. S24, Ep101
A young man becomes so immersed in a simulation game that he allegedly slams into a television set. S24, Ep102

programmes.show_name: UK Crime Files: Last Taxi Rider
programmes.show_description: Dr. Nell Darby visits how taxi driver Linda Thomas made a fatal error of judgement one night in 1973, when she was flagged down by a drifter.

programmes.show_description: Police officer Martin Forshaw kills fiancé, Claire Howarth, in Greater Manchester, just days before their wedding. His poor staging of a car crash led to a life sentence. S1, Ep6
Rachel Entwistle believes her husband to be Prince Charming, but he lives a secret life of sex and porn, and the pressure of hiding his secret becomes too much for him. S1, Ep2
When Mary Thompson's 'perfect man' reveals he is a CIA agent, Mary and her children are drawn into a web of lies and danger. S1, Ep3

A mother of five is left stranded with three additional children when her friend heads to the Dominican Republic on vacation and does not return on time. S22, Ep251
Two young men allegedly get into trouble with the law for drug possession; both families fight over duelling restraining orders. S22, Ep252
A woman's prized lamp from Paris is allegedly damaged by a moving company; movers claim she misrepresent the size of the job. S22, Ep253
The Judge grills a diamond expert about the quality of diamonds he and his ex-wife are fighting over. S22, Ep254

This question is posed to a man who defends his Pit Bull's attack of a smaller dog by saying the animal could have locked jaws and killed if he'd wanted to. S20, Ep18
A truant high school student is shuttled between her mother and father's homes leaving them fighting over discipline and a crushed cell phone. S20, Ep19
When ex-lovers fight over custody of a joint bank account, the Judge reminds them of the three rules of her courtroom. S20, Ep20
While the Judge gets a year younger, a 13-year-old allegedly steals a car and totals it two blocks from home. S24, Ep103
A basketball league allegedly makes a habit of paying vendors late; a basketball referee claims he is owed $3,000. S24, Ep104
A married couple confess that they did not take their contractor up on his offer to do a final walkthrough; this weakens their case that he did a shoddy job. S24, Ep105
A woman can't keep up with costs to care for her beloved 20K show jumper; when the horse goes lame, she can't afford to keep him alive. S23, Ep26
A woman brings to court her surviving dog and the ashes of a toy Yorkie that did not survive an alleged attack by her neighbour's Pit Bull. S23, Ep27

A woman breaks down after hearing the Judge's verdict in regards to her beloved dog that she shared with her boyfriend. S23, Ep33
A once happy relationship downgrades into a contentious living situation with accusations of theft, assault and stolen property. S20, Ep33

A woman throws the father of her children out of her house when he shows up late and drunk to babysit their two kids; he denies vandalizing her truck. S20, Ep35
After a car windshield is bashed with a brick, a man claims he witnessed his ex-girlfriend, dressed all in black, running from the crime scene. S20, Ep36

programmes.show_name: UK Crime Files: The Railway Killers
programmes.show_description: Jackie Malton examines the case of John Duffy and David Mulcahy, who murdered three women across London in the 1980s before both were convicted in 2001.

programmes.show_name: UK Crime Files: Bus Stop Rapist
programmes.show_description: In 1992, an attack in Nottingham led to an investigation which lasted nearly a quarter of a century. In time, DNA profiling would help to close the case.
In this gripping episode, we explore the tragic story of Sarah Williams, whose obsession with former fireman Ian Johnston leads to the murder of his new partner, Sadie Hartley. S1, Ep6
Jessica McGraa's murder in Aberdeen showed the risks to sex workers and the role of forensics in convictions. S3, Ep3
